RULING - The matter is Discussed. Counsel reports the matter is Unopposed.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT STEPHENS CONSTRUCTION, INC.'s Motion To Enforce Civil Code Of Procedure Section 998 Settlement And Request For Sanctions.

Defendant Stephens Construction's motion to enforce CCP 998 settlement is GRANTED. Plaintiff filed a response stating non-opposition to the motion. I award $1,000 against plaintiff for defendant's reasonable expenses, sought under CCP 185.5.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)
